project_type: React board game (Shogun's Ascent) with TypeScript, Vite, and Zustand state management
test_framework: No test framework configured (no test files found)
test_command: npx tsc -b (type-checking only, no unit tests)
verification_instructions: Run `npx tsc -b && npx vite build` to verify TypeScript compiles and Vite bundles without errors
setup_instructions: node_modules already installed (package-lock.json present and node_modules dir exists)
environment_constraints: No test suite. Verification is build-only. Dev server available via `npm run dev`.
key_patterns: Zustand store (src/store/gameStore.ts) manages all game state. Game logic is in src/utils/gameLogic.ts. Types/constants in src/types/game.ts. Components in src/components/. No i18n exists yet. TemplePanel uses imported PNG images for kami. MainMenu has some Spanish text already mixed in.
directory_structure: src/types/ - type definitions and constants; src/utils/ - game logic; src/store/ - Zustand store; src/components/ - React components; src/img/ - kami PNG images; public/ - static assets
